entries.notes: Travel day — land, grab the rental, shake-out evening session 18:00–21:00. Tell me how it fished and I'll fill this in with the day's conditions.

conditions.flowCfs: Lower Henry's Fork ~2,390 CFS (Rexburg gauge, prov.)
conditions.hatch: Evening caddis #14–16 + building PMD spinner; golden-stone attractor #10–12; BWO if clouds build. Best window 19:00–21:30.
